hook.summary: High-action combat gameplay featuring a legendary general with sharp graphics.
hook.visual_action: Guan Yu performing rapid, flashy attacks against multiple enemies in a 3D environment.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Chiêm ngưỡng đồ họa sắc nét tại Hoàn Mỹ Tam Quốc với võ tướng Quan Vũ dũng mãnh.

scene_flow: Intense combat gameplay showcasing Guan Yu's skills and high combo counts.
Transition to a cinematic 3D render of a character performing a powerful move.
Character spinning in a red vortex, transitioning to a wide shot of a battlefield.
Final splash screen with game logo and download buttons.
audience_proxy: Male gamers interested in Three Kingdoms lore and high-action RPGs.
